mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_api (api_id, api_name, base_url, api_key, api_type, api_status, api_from) VALUES (#{configId}, #{name}, #{content}, #{secret}, #{type}, #{status}, #{ownerId})
mapper.select: SELECT api_id AS config_id, api_name AS name, api_type AS type, base_url AS content, api_key AS secret, NULL AS ref_id, api_status AS status, api_from AS owner_id, NULL AS owner_type, NULL AS config_type, create_time, update_time FROM ai_api ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_api SET api_name = #{name}, base_url = #{content}, api_key = #{secret}, api_type = #{type}, api_status = #{status}, api_from = #{ownerId} WHERE api_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_api SET api_status = #{status} WHERE api_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_model (model_id, api_id, model_name, model_type, model_status, model_from) VALUES (#{configId}, #{refId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{status}, #{ownerId})
mapper.select: SELECT model_id AS config_id, model_name AS name, model_type AS type, NULL AS content, NULL AS secret, api_id AS ref_id, model_status AS status, model_from AS owner_id, NULL AS owner_type, NULL AS config_type, create_time, update_time FROM ai_model ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model SET api_id = #{refId}, model_name = #{name}, model_type = #{type}, model_status = #{status}, model_from = #{ownerId} WHERE model_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_model SET model_status = #{status} WHERE model_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_client (client_id, client_type, client_role, model_id, model_name, client_name, client_status, client_from) VALUES (#{configId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{refId}, #{secret}, #{name}, #{status}, #{ownerId})
mapper.select: SELECT client_id AS config_id, client_name AS name, client_type AS type, client_role AS content, model_name AS secret, model_id AS ref_id, client_status AS status, client_from AS owner_id, NULL AS owner_type, NULL AS config_type, create_time, update_time FROM ai_client ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_client SET client_type = #{type}, client_role = #{content}, model_id = #{refId}, model_name = #{secret}, client_name = #{name}, client_status = #{status}, client_from = #{ownerId} WHERE client_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_client SET client_status = #{status} WHERE client_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_prompt (prompt_id, prompt_name, prompt_type, prompt_content, prompt_status, prompt_from) VALUES (#{configId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{content}, #{status}, #{ownerId})
mapper.select: SELECT prompt_id AS config_id, prompt_name AS name, prompt_type AS type, prompt_content AS content, NULL AS secret, NULL AS ref_id, prompt_status AS status, prompt_from AS owner_id, NULL AS owner_type, NULL AS config_type, create_time, update_time FROM ai_prompt ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_prompt SET prompt_name = #{name}, prompt_type = #{type}, prompt_content = #{content}, prompt_status = #{status}, prompt_from = #{ownerId} WHERE prompt_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_prompt SET prompt_status = #{status} WHERE prompt_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_advisor (advisor_id, advisor_name, advisor_type, advisor_config, advisor_status) VALUES (#{configId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT advisor_id AS config_id, advisor_name AS name, advisor_type AS type, advisor_config AS content, NULL AS secret, NULL AS ref_id, advisor_status AS status, 0 AS owner_id, NULL AS owner_type, NULL AS config_type, create_time, update_time FROM ai_advisor ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_advisor SET advisor_name = #{name}, advisor_type = #{type}, advisor_config = #{content}, advisor_status = #{status} WHERE advisor_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_advisor SET advisor_status = #{status} WHERE advisor_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_mcp (mcp_id, mcp_name, mcp_type, mcp_config, mcp_secret, mcp_timeout, mcp_status, mcp_from) VALUES (#{configId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{content}, #{secret}, COALESCE(#{timeoutMinutes}, 3), #{status}, #{ownerId})
mapper.select: SELECT mcp_id AS config_id, mcp_name AS name, mcp_type AS type, mcp_config AS content, mcp_secret AS secret, NULL AS ref_id, mcp_status AS status, mcp_from AS owner_id, NULL AS owner_type, NULL AS config_type, mcp_timeout AS timeout_minutes, create_time, update_time FROM ai_mcp ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_mcp SET mcp_name = #{name}, mcp_type = #{type}, mcp_config = #{content}, mcp_secret = #{secret}, mcp_timeout = COALESCE(#{timeoutMinutes}, mcp_timeout), mcp_status = #{status}, mcp_from = #{ownerId} WHERE mcp_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_mcp SET mcp_status = #{status} WHERE mcp_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_config (config_id, owner_id, owner_type, config_type, ref_id, config_status) VALUES (#{configId}, COALESCE(#{content}, CAST(#{ownerId} AS CHAR)), COALESCE(#{ownerType}, #{type}), COALESCE(#{configType}, #{secret}), #{refId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT config_id, owner_id AS content, '' AS name, owner_type AS type, config_type AS secret, ref_id, config_status AS status, 0 AS owner_id, owner_type, config_type, create_time, update_time FROM ai_config ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_config SET owner_id = COALESCE(#{content}, CAST(#{ownerId} AS CHAR)), owner_type = COALESCE(#{ownerType}, #{type}), config_type = COALESCE(#{configType}, #{secret}), ref_id = #{refId}, config_status = #{status} WHERE config_id = #{configId}
UPDATE ai_config SET config_status = #{status} WHERE config_id = #{configId}
